title: Stealth Mastery
wikitext:
[[File:The RED Spy reveals himself, ver. 4.gif|center|thumb|600px|The RED [[Spy]] successfully played the role of the BLU [[Scout]], fooling the BLU team]]
{{Quote|This Spy has already breached our defenses... You've seen what he's done to our colleagues! And worst of all: he could be '''any one of us.'''|The BLU [[Spy]], discussing the identity of the RED Spy with his team}}

==Summary==
'''Stealth Mastery''' is ability to make use of stealth, generally for the purpose of spying on and/or assassinating targets. Users are highly skilled at stealth and have incredibly extensive knowledge and skill in many types and ways of stealth tactics, enabling him to easily slip in and out of areas undetected. Their abilities in all manners of stealth are so refined that they can typically remain hidden, unseen, and unheard to strike at enemies once a time before getting spotted, followed, or traced. Stealth can usually be accomplished through pure skill, specialized equipment, and/or the usage of other powers, such as [[Invisibility]], [[Adaptation|adapting to blend into one's surroundings]], [[Perception Manipulation|dampening one's presence entirely]], or [[Sound Manipulation|suppressing the sounds one would make]].

==Possible Uses==
* Moving throughout even the most guarded of areas and act in true discretion
* [[Martial Arts|Engaging in unconventional guerilla and covert combat]]
* Completely slipping by the senses of others
* [[Camouflage|Expertly camouflaging oneself]] in order to blend into the environment
* Successfully adopting the role of others or entirely new personas
*Masking one's own identity during an interaction
* Accurately inserting oneself into a social environment that is unlike their own
* [[Enhanced Senses|Remaining acutely vigilant of the environment]]
* Concealing one's presence
* Carefully robbing, stealing, and looting while evading detection
* [[Adaptation|Adapting to the surrounding area]]

==Users==
*[[Batman (Post-Crisis)|Members]] [[Robin (Damian Wayne)|of]] [[Nightwing (Post-Crisis)|the]] [[Barbara Gordon (Post-Crisis)|Bat]] [[Cassandra Cain (Post-Crisis)|Family]] ([[DC Comics]])
*[[Spider-Man (Marvel Comics)|Spider-Man]] ([[Marvel Comics]])
*[[Agent 47]] (Hitman)
* Many characters from [[Assassin's Creed]]
* [[Spy]] ([[Team Fortress]])
